title: Get More Reviews
content_md:
# Get More Reviews

- Code: 3d4f70e5
- Source: https://www.skool.com/ai-seo-mastery-pro/classroom/63a81f62?md=3d4f70e57d074b3daaa1ee6ae423ecbf
- Video: https://www.loom.com/share/110e23f83648455db7a6eb8cb11844e0?sid=5b29010f-9d01-4755-a875-52af3c8542b8?hide_owner=true&hide_share=true&hide_title=true&hideEmbedTopBar=true
- Duration: 2m 23s

## Description

_(no description)_

transcript.text: So in my experience the best way to get reviews to a GBP is to have the business owner send a text message
To all of their prior customers. Okay, so the message the script I put it in the module for you
I don't mention the customer's name and the reason for that is this
The goal is for this to be a text message that you can text to your business owner
And they're just going to be able to copy paste copy paste copy paste copy paste and send this text out to 15 20 30 different prior customers
Getting this request from the business owner from the business owner's phone. The response rate is 50 60 percent
Okay, so this is by far the most effective way to ask for reviews and to do that
We're gonna come and if we click on ask for reviews we get the review link right here
So we're gonna add this review link. We're gonna change the company name
We're gonna put the service product in there
We can even get rid of the service product if there's a wide variety that's offered because again the goal is to make
This as easy as possible. We're gonna put this review link in there and then just text it out to all of the customers. Okay
There is an alternative. It's a lot less effective, but let me show you real quick
This is again in high level. It's a reputation management
So we're not we don't have a trigger instead
We have a goal and the goal is to get them to click on the review link
Okay
So what that means is as soon as the that review link is clicked on this automation will stop
Then we're going to add customers to this automation is going to send them a text wait send an email wait send a text
And that's it. We don't want to spam our customers. So it's two texts and an email just politely asking for a review
Just politely asking for a review here
So and if they click on that link the automation will end that way we don't spam them if they actually do it and
You know, it's it's very simple very quick
This has maybe a 10 to 20 percent response rate asking the business owner to do it from their phone is like
60 plus percent response rate
So, you know much much better to actually just have the business owner
Do the texting directly from their phone rather than set this up in high level
You also want to make sure of course that your a2p registration is complete. Otherwise these texts won't work
Another hurdle, but hopefully your a2p registration is complete so you can send text from your clients phone anyhow
